examples.title: I/O Interface Program
examples.description: A pseudocode program illustrating the basic functions of an I/O interface, including data transfer and control.
examples.code:
INPUT data from external device
STORE data in I/O buffer
TRANSFER data to CPU
OUTPUT data to external device
examples.explanation: This program illustrates the basic functions of an I/O interface, including data transfer and control.

examples.title: I/O Buffering Program
examples.description: A C program illustrating the concept of I/O buffering, including the temporary storage of data during transfer.
examples.explanation: This program illustrates the concept of I/O buffering, including the temporary storage of data during transfer.

examples.title: I/O Caching Program
examples.description: A Java program illustrating the concept of I/O caching, including the storage of frequently accessed data in a faster, more accessible location.
examples.explanation: This program illustrates the concept of I/O caching, including the storage of frequently accessed data in a faster, more accessible location.
